evidence.title: README (segment 1)
evidence.excerpt: This repository contains core functionality needed to create .NET projects that are shared between Visual Studio and the [.NET CLI](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/tools/).

evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: See [dotnet/project-system](https://github.com/dotnet/project-system) for the project system work that is specific to Visual Studio.

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: Common project and item templates are found in [template_feed](https://github.com/dotnet/sdk/tree/main/template_feed).

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: You can download the .NET SDK as either an installer (MSI, PKG) or a zip (zip, tar.gz). The .NET SDK contains both the .NET runtime and CLI tools.

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: Sources for dotnet-install.sh and dotnet-install.ps1 are in the [install-scripts repo](https://github.com/dotnet/install-scripts).
